creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: forwarded from lwhsu email:

- Check the bugzilla we deployed contains the @freebsd.org (http://freebsd.org)
as a special case. A possible way is maybe adding a fallback from ldap/kerberos
to the local bugzilla database. But be aware:
* Be sure to check only fallback when "account is not existing", not
  "authentication failed"
